subject: Darumaka, a round roly-poly fire creature with a wide grin
description: A small, very round, red creature with short stubby limbs sits in a rocky outdoor setting. The figure has a wide open mouth in a broad grin, small eyes set high on its rounded head, and a cream-colored underside visible on its face and belly. Behind it, warm reddish-brown rocky terrain or desert landscape is visible. The creature's rotund, roly-poly form conveys a jovial, unsteady energy. The palette is dominated by warm reds, oranges, and sandy tones.
foreground: round red creature with wide grin and short limbs
background: rocky arid terrain in warm tones
